label: Website — SaaS Landing (Minimal)
note: token-cost-research.md §1.1. Source: Termdock landing page generation case study (2026-03-23). HTML, CSS, hero, 3-4 content blocks, basic JS.

label: Website — Animated 3D Marketing
note: token-cost-research.md §1.2. Source: MindStudio 3D website guide (2026-03-17). CSS 3D transforms, GSAP scroll animations, responsive design. v2.9: input bumped 15K→25K and output 3.5K→18K — original numbers were wildly low for a real 3D site generation (3.5K output can't even fit a scene graph).

label: Website — Full Next.js App
note: token-cost-research.md §1.3. Source: Next.js AI agent evaluations (2026-06-09). Multi-page routing, components, API routes, docs.

label: Database — PostgreSQL Schema (20 tables)
note: token-cost-research.md §2.1. Source: Claude Code schema generation benchmarks. CREATE TABLE statements, indexes, foreign keys, constraints.

label: Database — Schema + Seed + Migrations
note: token-cost-research.md §2.2. Source: Full-stack app case studies. Schema, 1000 rows seed data, migration scripts, ORM models.

label: Database — MongoDB + Aggregation Pipeline
note: token-cost-research.md §2.3. Source: RAG pipeline evaluations. 50+ collections, complex aggregations, indexes, sharding config.

label: Codebase — Small Python Package (5k lines)
note: token-cost-research.md §3.1. Source: SWE-bench analysis (2026-04-06). Core modules, tests, setup.py, docs.

label: Codebase — Medium Node.js Webapp (25k lines)
note: token-cost-research.md §3.2. Source: AgentMarketCap cost calculator. Express API, React frontend, tests, CI/CD config, README.

label: Codebase — Large Monorepo (100k lines)
note: token-cost-research.md §3.3. Source: Cursor IDE telemetry (~$200/month per heavy user implies ~1M tokens/day). 50+ services, microservices architecture, Docker configs, deployment scripts.

note: token-cost-research.md §4.1. Source: v0.dev component generation patterns. Game loop, sprites, collision detection, scoring, 1 level.

note: token-cost-research.md §4.2. Source: Full-stack web app case studies. Multiple levels, inventory system, save/load, sound, tilemaps.

note: token-cost-research.md §4.3. Source: Devin agent case studies (2026-03-03). 3D rendering, physics, real-time sync, lobby system, matchmaking.

label: ML Pipeline — Simple Scikit-learn
note: token-cost-research.md §5.1. Source: Cursor IDE ML template generation. Preprocessing, model definition, training loop, evaluation metrics.

label: ML Pipeline — PyTorch Computer Vision
note: token-cost-research.md §5.2. Source: RAG pipeline + training job estimates. Data loading, augmentation, model architecture, training config, hyperparameter tuning, inference.

label: ML Pipeline — Distributed Training (Databricks)
note: token-cost-research.md §5.3. Source: Devin agent + Databricks workflows. Spark configs, distributed training logic, monitoring, checkpointing, MLflow integration.

note: token-cost-research.md §6.2. Source: MindStudio + full-stack app research. 15+ screens, Core Data, authentication, push notifications, widgets.

note: token-cost-research.md §6.3. Source: Full-stack development studies. Cross-platform UI, BLoC pattern, Firebase backend, cloud functions, analytics.

label: Data Eng — Simple ETL (3 steps)
note: token-cost-research.md §7.1. Source: RAG pipeline patterns. Extract from API, transform with Pandas, load to Postgres.

note: token-cost-research.md §7.3. Source: Enterprise data pipeline case studies. Kafka topics, Flink jobs, windowing, state management, exactly-once semantics, monitoring.

note: token-cost-research.md §9.2. Source: SWE-bench framework migration tasks. 200+ components, hooks migration, concurrent features, test updates, type fixes.

note: token-cost-research.md §9.3. Source: Devin agent + architectural refactoring studies. Service boundaries extraction, API design, database splitting, deployment configs, integration tests, migration scripts.

label: Website — Static Landing Page
note: Generic small landing page: hero, 2-3 content sections, contact form, basic CSS. Common pattern.

label: Website — Blog / Content Site
note: Generic blog: homepage, post template, 5-10 posts, categories, RSS. Common pattern.

label: Mobile App — Simple (1-2 screens)
note: Generic small mobile app: 1-2 screens, basic navigation, simple state. Common pattern.

label: Website — MVP / Prototype
note: Quick MVP: working core feature, basic UI, deployed to staging. Common pattern.

label: Game — Quick Prototype
note: Generic game prototype: single mechanic, basic loop, no polish. Common pattern.

label: Game — Mobile Casual
note: Generic mobile casual game: tap/swipe mechanics, level progression, basic monetization hooks. Common pattern.

label: Game — Story / Visual Novel
note: Visual novel / story game: branching dialogue, character sprites, scene backgrounds. Common pattern.

label: Code — Small Script (<200 lines)
note: Generic small script: single file, single purpose, minimal dependencies. Common pattern.

label: Code — Medium CLI Tool
note: Generic CLI tool: argument parsing, subcommands, config file, basic tests. Common pattern.

label: Code — API Integration Layer
note: Generic API integration: 2-3 third-party APIs, auth, error handling, rate limiting, retry. Common pattern.

label: Code — Test Suite Generation
note: Test suite for existing codebase: unit tests, integration tests, fixtures. Common pattern.

label: Data — Small Analysis (CSV / JSON)
note: Generic small data analysis: load CSV/JSON, summary stats, basic plots. Common pattern.

label: Data — Dashboard / Reporting
note: Generic dashboard: SQL queries, charts, filters, scheduled refresh. Common pattern.

label: Data — Schema Migration
note: Generic schema migration: ALTER TABLE, data backfill, rollback script, app code updates. Common pattern.

label: Data — Cleaning & Transformation
note: Generic data cleaning: handle nulls, dedupe, normalize, validate. Common pattern.
